refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries, and represent these elements in a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it clarifies the distinct functional aspects: terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation, which are critical for planning and operational safety.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating the generation of a worksite model/map that includes accurate terrain data, identified obstacles, and clearly defined work-zone boundaries, validated against ground truth or site surveys.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent work-zone boundaries and operational areas in the model.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification and terrain feature extraction.
DP3: Generate a geospatial digital map integrating terrain, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically addresses the FR with minimal coupling to other functions; sensor fusion is a foundational step enabling subsequent processing.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors in the worksite environment.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies due to environmental conditions (dust, weather).
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating redundancy or alternative sensing methods to mitigate sensor failure or data quality issues.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level module responsible for integrating sensor data, processing worksite analysis, and generating the worksite model/map.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model/map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Communicates detected obstacles or hazardous terrain features to Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module centralizes worksite analysis and modeling; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module provides raw sensor data but does not perform analysis; higher diffusion if analysis is distributed here.
Teleoperation may use model data but should not perform core analysis to avoid diffusion.
Safety Services consumes alerts but does not generate the worksite model.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite analysis and modeling in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing is centralized.
Integration complexity with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for data exchange.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate performance and consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution if needed to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (sensor fusion) directly satisfies the refined FR by enabling accurate terrain and obstacle data acquisition.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as analysis is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate, ensuring clear module boundaries.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's ability to generate accurate worksite models from sensor data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor sensor data quality and consider fallback strategies.
Plan for scalability within NGHE Solution to handle data processing load.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, with clear ownership and manageable risks. Verification approaches are feasible, and interfaces are well-defined.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent work-zone boundaries and operational areas in the model.

revise.why: Current level is sufficiently decomposed and assigned; no immediate revision needed.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and available.
NGHE Solution module has sufficient processing capability.
open_risks: Integration complexity with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing.
